name_cn:
Model N00198 Denim Blue
This Nevereverfull tote bag presents a distinctive check pattern in Damier Denim 3D cotton canvas, showcasing a chic look with polished metal hardware and leather trim. A zip closure provides ample space, working together with a detachable cotton denim canvas pocket to secure your belongings. Dimensions: 60 x 38 x 23 cm (L x H x W)
- Damier Denim 3D cotton canvas
- Calfskin trim
- Fabric lining
- Hardware
- Double zip closure
- Padlock
- Detachable nameplate
- Interior zip pocket
- Detachable pocket made of cotton denim canvas
- Handles: Double handles
- Made in France, Spain, Italy or the USA
